title: Unknown Input, Zod 4 Validation, Domain Types, and Output Contracts · Compiler Case: Output Schema Minimization
summary: The service casts req.body, accepts unknown keys, transforms before authorization, returns internal objects directly, and treats TypeScript inference as runtime proof. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsts output schema minimization increment in runtime schema and trusted domain boundary. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Map domain results through explicit response schemas that minimize fields, stabilize nullability, and detect accidental secret or internal-property disclosure.
